arts.ttl: Report: Chelsea were close to agreeing deal for Jhon Duran then one big problem arose
arts.sum: Villa will be so glad he stayed.

arts.ttl: How to watch Chelsea vs Gent - TV channel, live stream and kick-off time - football.london
arts.sum: Chelsea officially begin their Europa Conference League campaign on Thursday night when they take on Gent. Tonight's fixture will be the first of six league phase fixtures of the Europa Conference League and Chelsea's penultimate match before the October international brek with Nottingham Forest up next in the Premier League this weekend.

arts.ttl: Alan Shearer names his valuation of Cole Palmer as he admits £42.5m fee 'looks to be INCREDIBLE business' after the Chelsea star's phenomenal rise
arts.sum: Chelsea paid £42.5million to sign Palmer from Manchester City in September 2023 and he has proceeded to surpass expectations.

arts.ttl: Chelsea vs Gent LIVE! Conference League match stream, latest team news, lineups, TV, prediction today
arts.sum: Blues firm favourites to lift Conference League trophy in May

arts.ttl: 'Fantastic' Chelsea youngster included in U21 Team of the Month for September
arts.sum: Chelsea’s youngster has been rewarded for his recent form by being named in an Under-21 Team of the Month for September. There’s some serious young...

arts.ttl: 2025 Summer Transfer Window May Open Early For FIFA Club World Cup Teams
arts.sum: For the first time since 2002, a third transfer window is in the works with FIFA looking to implement it ahead of the 2025 Club World Cup

arts.ttl: Chelsea co-owners Clearlake Capital complete major £1.6bn deal amid Todd Boehly takeover talk
arts.sum: Chelsea co-owners Clearlake Capital has expanded its business portfolio by completing a billion-dollar buyout of a software company in the US. Both Clearlake chief Behdad Eghbali and Todd Boehly are said to be discontented with how each other are approaching the running of Chelsea and wish to buy out their counterparts.

arts.ttl: Eidur Gudjohnsen’s son faces Chelsea 19 years after appearing on pitch as a baby
arts.sum: It’s set to be a ‘special’ night for the Gudjohnsen family at Stamford Bridge

arts.ttl: Report: £30m Chelsea loanee is hoping to finally make his debut for new club next month

Former Chelsea captain Paul Elliott pays tribute to his Kick It Out co-founder Lord Herman Ouseley in the wake of his tragic death - with first black Premier League skipper praising 'a great man in love with justice, fairness and equality'
arts.sum: SAMI MOKBEL: Lord Ouseley (right) passed away on Monday at the the age of 79 and tributes have been streaming in for the equalities activist, who co-founded Kick It Out with Elliott (left) in 1993.
